summary: Phase 1 testing: UserProfilePage refactoring (sub-components) + role-based posting permissions. All 29/29 backend tests PASS. All frontend UI tests PASS.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility warning, non-functional

1_userprofilepage_renders.details: UserProfilePage renders with data-testid='user-profile-page', profile card (username, pronouns, location, rating, badges), gallery section, services/journey section

2_userratings_own_profile.details: For own profile (isSelf=true): send-message-btn, rate-user-btn, report-user-btn are all hidden

3_userratings_other_profile.details: For other user's profile: send-message-btn, rate-user-btn, report-user-btn all visible. Rate dialog (comment input, submit button), Report dialog (reason select, description input, submit button) both open/close correctly

4_usergallery_own_profile.details: isSelf=true: upload-photo-btn and gallery-settings-btn visible. Empty gallery state shows 'Zatím žádné fotky' with camera icon

5_usergallery_other_profile.details: isSelf=false: upload and settings buttons hidden. When gallery empty+public, returns null correctly. Layout adapts (journey moves to cols 2-3)

6_userjourney_services.details: 'Nabídky a poptávky' heading with Briefcase icon visible. Services shown correctly with offer/need/location badges. Expired badge shown for expired offers

7_news_categories_allowed_roles.details: GET /api/news-categories returns allowed_roles for all categories. zkusenosti=['user','specialist','admin','lawyer'], others=['admin']

8_admin_news_categories.details: GET /api/admin/news-categories requires auth (401 without token). Returns same data as public endpoint with allowed_roles

9_put_allowed_roles.details: PUT /api/admin/news-categories/{id}/allowed-roles: requires admin (403 for regular user), requires auth (401 unauthenticated), updates and persists correctly, empty list → 400, all invalid roles → 400, nonexistent cat → 404

10_post_news_permissions.details: Admin can post to any category. Regular user can post to zkusenosti (returns 200, is_community_story=True). Regular user cannot post to local/world (403). Dynamic role grant works. Unauthenticated → 401

11_newspage_admin_canpost.details: Admin sees 'Nová aktualita' button on all categories: all, local, world, zkusenosti, tips

12_newspage_user_canpost.details: Regular user: NO button on 'all', NO button on 'local', NO button on 'world'. Button 'Sdílet příběh' ONLY shown on zkusenosti category. Dialog submit says 'Sdílet příběh'

13_admin_newscatscard_shields.details: Admin Content tab: Kategorie aktualit card shows Shield icon with count per category. zkusenosti=4, world=1, local=1, tips=1, events=1, interviews=1

14_admin_roles_editor.details: Clicking Shield count expands roles-editor with role toggles (Uživatel, Specialista, Právník, Admin). For zkusenosti all 4 are selected. Toggle add/remove works. Save shows 'Oprávnění uložena' toast. Count updates immediately

15_public_profile_api.details: GET /api/users/{id}/public-profile requires auth (403 unauthenticated). Returns username, avg_rating, rating_count. 404 for nonexistent user

backend_test_coverage.TestNewsCategoriesPublic: 5/5 PASS - status, list, allowed_roles present, zkusenosti defaults, others admin-only
backend_test_coverage.TestNewsCategoriesAdmin: 4/4 PASS - status, requires auth, allowed_roles present, matches public
backend_test_coverage.TestUpdateNewsCategoryRoles: 8/8 PASS - requires admin, requires auth, add user role, persistence, empty rejected, invalid rejected, 404 nonexistent, restore
backend_test_coverage.TestNewsPostPermissions: 7/7 PASS - admin anywhere, user to zkusenosti, user blocked from local, auth required, community_story flag, dynamic grant, cleanup
backend_test_coverage.TestUserPublicProfile: 4/4 PASS - requires auth, correct fields, nonexistent→404, unauthenticated→403

critical_code_review_comments: UserGallery.js: md:col-span-3 on root element means gallery takes FULL ROW (3 cols) when rendered. When gallery returns null (empty+not self+not locked), the md:col-span-2 UserJourney correctly fills cols 2-3 of row 1. Layout is correct but could be confusing

NewsPage.js line 202-205: canPost for 'all' category falls back to (isAdmin || activeCat==='zkusenosti') which evaluates to false for regular users. This is correct behavior - no post button on 'all' tab

NewsPage.js: zkusenosti-note card has an extra 'Sdílet svůj příběh' button (line 338) shown when isAuthenticated && !canPost && activeCat==='zkusenosti'. For regular users (canPost=true for zkusenosti), this button correctly does NOT show
settings.py: _apply_allowed_roles_defaults() correctly ensures all categories have allowed_roles. The default for unknown categories is ['admin'] which is safe
news.py: POST /api/news dynamically fetches allowed_roles from DB, with fallback to hardcoded defaults for non-persisted categories. Logic is correct
DialogContent components missing aria-describedby attributes - accessibility issue (console warning). Should add aria-describedby or description for accessibility compliance
UserProfilePage.js: only ~130 lines (well refactored). UserGallery/UserRatings/UserJourney properly split into separate components

test_credentials.note: Registration requires password with uppercase, lowercase, digit AND special char (!@#$%)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test user 'testuser_canpost@bloom-test.cz'. Temporarily changed world category allowed_roles to ['admin','user'] then restored to ['admin']. Restored tips category to ['admin'] after dynamic grant test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 fully tested. DB state: all categories have allowed_roles: zkusenosti=['user','specialist','admin','lawyer'], all others=['admin']. Admin user: test1@bloom.cz/test123. There is a test category 'haters' (id=search-icon-reveal) in DB that can be cleaned up. For Playwright tests: use page.add_init_script('sessionStorage.setItem("bloom_intro_shown", "1")') before reload. Registration password requires: uppercase + lowercase + digit + special char.
rca_of_issues: No critical issues found. Minor accessibility warning for missing aria-describedby on Dialog components (pre-existing issue, not from Phase 1 changes)
